purpose: Local release-candidate route for a publishable AI runtime framework-config bundle without model weights.

models.name: Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-int8-ov
models.notes: Model weights are referenced by AI config but are not included in this publishable framework-config bundle.

models.name: Phi-3.5-mini-instruct-int4-ov
models.notes: Model weights are referenced by AI config but are not included in this publishable framework-config bundle.

conversions.name: Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice OpenVINO fp16 cache
conversions.notes: Conversion cache is host-managed and excluded from this public-safe config bundle.

conversions.name: Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice OpenVINO int8-cpfp16 cache
conversions.notes: Conversion cache is host-managed and excluded from this public-safe config bundle.

framework_configs.name: abyss-machine-ai-runtime-config
framework_configs.notes: The signed artifact subject is the framework-config bundle tarball.

not_applicable.datasets: No dataset artifact is distributed by this framework-config bundle.

consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: AI runtime consumers select an ai_model_or_runtime_bundle registry latest only after durable evidence promotion, subject materialization, and a runtime trust-gate allow or warn verdict over ABI, SBOM, ML-BOM, SLSA/in-toto, Sigstore/Cosign, digest, source repo, and trust root mode.

consumer_command: abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref abyss-machine:ai-runtime-config --evidence-ref manual-positive:ai-runtime-config --source-repo abyss-machine --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/ai_runtime_config_bundle.bundle.json --producer abyss-machine-ai-runtime-config-packager --trust-root-mode oci_registry --trust-root-evidence-json @TRUST_ROOT_EVIDENCE_JSON --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --store-root SUBJECT_STORE_ROOT --manifest manifests/artifact_bundles/ai_runtime_config_bundle.bundle.json --consumer-intent runtime --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode oci_registry --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class ai_model_or_runtime_bundle --consumer-intent runtime --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode oci_registry --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json

abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class ai_model_or_runtime_bundle --consumer-intent runtime --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode oci_registry --json
